meta_title: For Freelancers: deployment workflow to Solve no SaaS knowledge (Beginner Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to deployment workflow and overcome no SaaS knowledge. A Beginner-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Freelancer Deployment Workflow: Master SaaS Shipping
content.seo_description: Master professional SaaS deployment with this beginner-friendly checklist. Learn to use Antigravity and Claude Code to ship projects faster and impress clients.
content.answer_block: Stop struggling with manual infrastructure. By leveraging Antigravity for automated environment configuration and Claude Code for intelligent CLI orchestration, you can reduce deployment overhead by 90%. This workflow transforms complex SaaS delivery into a repeatable, one-command process, allowing you to focus on high-value features rather than server headaches.
content.intro:
The screen flickers, the code is 'finished,' but the server remains a black box. For the freelancer, the transition from local development to a live, scalable SaaS environment is where dreams go to die. You aren't just missing knowledge; you're missing a bridge between your IDE and the production environment.

Today, we dismantle the complexity of professional deployment. By integrating Antigravity’s architectural intelligence with the precision of Claude Code, we turn the daunting task of 'shipping' into a predictable, automated rhythm. This is how you stop being a coder who builds, and start being an engineer who delivers.

steps.title: Standardize Environment Specs
steps.description: Define your infrastructure as code (IaC) to ensure your production environment matches your local machine perfectly every time.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze my current project structure and generate a comprehensive 'infrastructure.yaml' file that includes production-ready database, caching, and environment variable configurations.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'generate infrastructure.yaml based on project architecture'

steps.title: Automate Dependency Manifests
steps.description: Ensure zero-downtime dependency management by locking versions and automating build-time security scans.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Audit my dependencies and create a hardened deployment script that installs only necessary production packages, skipping dev-dependencies.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'create production-harden.sh script for dependency management'

steps.title: Implement Intelligent CI/CD Triggers
steps.description: Set up automated triggers that run tests and deploy only when code passes defined quality gates.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Draft a CI/CD pipeline configuration that triggers on push, runs unit tests, and deploys to staging automatically.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'configure github actions for automated staging deployment'

steps.title: Sanitize Production Secrets
steps.description: Never hardcode keys. Use a secure injection method to handle client credentials during the deployment phase.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a secure vault integration strategy for this project, ensuring environment variables are injected at runtime via secrets manager.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'implement secure environment variable injection pattern'

steps.title: Execute One-Command Deployment
steps.description: Finalize your workflow by wrapping the entire pipeline into a single, executable CLI command for rapid iteration.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a master deploy.sh script that chains the previous steps into one seamless deployment flow with error handling.

pro_tips: Always use a staging environment that mirrors production; never deploy directly to a live client site without a dry run.
Tag your container images with git commit hashes to make rollbacks instantaneous if a bug hits production.
Implement health checks in your deployment script that automatically abort if the service doesn't return a 200 OK after startup.
Use Claude Code to write your README documentation automatically after every major deployment, ensuring your clients always have updated manuals.
Run 'claude diff' before every deployment to verify that infrastructure changes match your intent, preventing accidental production overrides.
content.next_steps: Once your first deployment is live, focus on setting up automated monitoring and alerting to ensure your client's SaaS remains performant 24/7.
content.conversion_block: Stop wasting hours on manual server configuration and start shipping like a senior engineer. Our community provides the templates, prompts, and peer reviews you need to scale your freelancing business. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
